name: The Fairway Club
address: 908 NE Chipman Rd, Lee's Summit, MO 64086
about: The Fairway Club is an indoor golf training facility and entertainment center located in Lee's Summit, Missouri, equipped with Foresight Falcon launch monitors and GS Pro simulator software. It offers a comprehensive range of services including data-driven golf lessons, simulator rentals for individual or group play, and organized leagues. The venue provides a weatherproof environment for practice and play, featuring advanced technology for instant swing analysis and course simulation. Pricing for simulator rentals varies by package, typically ranging from $75 to $100 per hour for up to four to five people per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Foresight Falcon technology provides instant, data-driven feedback on every swing
Simulator practice is weatherproof and more efficient than traditional methods
Variety of services from lessons and leagues to casual play with friends
Access to over 1,500 golf courses worldwide through GS Pro software

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced overhead launch monitor with high-speed precision optics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The content does not mention a policy on outside food and drinks, so this information is not available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Skill level may vary, but typically one person can play 18 holes in one hour, and four people would take four hours.

faq.question: Is The Fairway Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and mentions helping introduce beginners to the game, indicating it is suitable for juniors and youth.
